tree.setup: An electronics store where the fluorescent lights hum a constant middle C. You need a new laptop and are standing between two models like a person choosing between two roads in a yellow wood. The sales consultant, Xiao He, has the gift of explaining technical specifications using analogies that even your grandmother would understand.
tree.setup_zh: 电子产品店里日光灯嗡嗡作响，保持着恒定的中央C。你需要一台新笔记本电脑，站在两个型号之间，像一个在黄色树林中两条路之间做选择的人。销售顾问小何有一种天赋，能用你奶奶都能听懂的比喻来解释技术参数。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 看笔记本电脑？这两款都不错。你平时用电脑做什么？
turns.text_pinyin: kàn bǐjìběn diànnǎo? zhè liǎng kuǎn dōu búcuò. nǐ píngshí yòng diànnǎo zuò shénme?
turns.text_en: Looking at laptops? Both of these are good. What do you usually use a computer for?

options.text_zh: 主要是办公和看视频。偶尔修图。不打游戏。
options.text_pinyin: zhǔyào shì bàngōng hé kàn shìpín. ǒu'ěr xiū tú. bù dǎ yóuxì.
options.text_en: Mainly office work and watching videos. Occasional photo editing. No gaming.
options.feedback: Clear use case. Xiao He immediately knows which model to recommend — and more importantly, which one NOT to oversell.
General enough. He'll suggest the more affordable option.
Xiao He pauses. 「什么都用」is the laptop equivalent of「随便」— it means he needs to ask more questions.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 那这两个的区别主要是：这台便宜的内存是8G，够办公用。那台贵一点的是16G，修图更流畅。价格差八百块。
turns.text_pinyin: nà zhè liǎng gè de qūbié zhǔyào shì: zhè tái piányi de nèicún shì bā G, gòu bàngōng yòng. nà tái guì yìdiǎn de shì shíliù G, xiū tú gèng liúchàng. jiàgé chā bābǎi kuài.
turns.text_en: The main difference: the cheaper one has 8GB RAM — enough for office work. The pricier one has 16GB — smoother for photo editing. 800 yuan price difference.

options.text_zh: 如果以后想加内存，便宜的那台可以升级吗？
options.text_pinyin: rúguǒ yǐhòu xiǎng jiā nèicún, piányi de nà tái kěyǐ shēngjí ma?
options.text_en: If I want to add memory later, can the cheaper one be upgraded?
options.feedback: Forward-thinking question. Xiao He checks the specs — and his respect for you goes up a notch.

options.text_zh: 贵的那台还有什么优点？
options.text_pinyin: guì de nà tái hái yǒu shénme yōudiǎn?
options.text_en: What other advantages does the expensive one have?
options.feedback: He lists screen quality and battery life. His analogies involve tea thermoses and window sizes.

options.text_pinyin: bābǎi kuài chā tǐng duō de.
options.feedback: He nods. For some people it is, for others it isn't. He won't push either way.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这台可以升级，没问题。对了，这两台现在都有活动，买电脑送鼠标和电脑包。
turns.text_pinyin: zhè tái kěyǐ shēngjí, méi wèntí. duìle, zhè liǎng tái xiànzài dōu yǒu huódòng, mǎi diànnǎo sòng shǔbiāo hé diànnǎo bāo.
turns.text_en: This one can be upgraded, no problem. By the way, both are on promotion — buy a laptop, get a free mouse and laptop bag.

options.text_zh: 那我买便宜的那台。以后需要的话再升级。还能送鼠标和电脑包，挺好的。
options.text_pinyin: nà wǒ mǎi piányi de nà tái. yǐhòu xūyào de huà zài shēngjí. hái néng sòng shǔbiāo hé diànnǎo bāo, tǐng hǎo de.
options.text_en: I'll take the cheaper one. I can upgrade later if needed. The free mouse and bag are a nice bonus.
options.feedback: Rational choice with a future-proof plan. Xiao He wraps it up, genuinely happy he didn't oversell.

options.text_zh: 我买贵的那台吧，省得以后升级麻烦。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ mǎi guì de nà tái ba, shěngde yǐhòu shēngjí máfan.
options.text_en: I'll get the expensive one — saves the hassle of upgrading later.
options.feedback: Also rational, just from the other direction. He processes the sale.

options.text_en: Let me think about it more.
options.feedback: He hands you his business card. The promotion ends Sunday — no pressure, but also pressure.

tree.cultural_note: Chinese electronics stores often bundle promotions (活动, huódòng) — free accessories with a purchase. Sales staff tend to be knowledgeable and patient. The phrase 性价比 (xìngjiàbǐ, price-to-performance ratio) is the magic word in Chinese consumer culture.
